ApproveTeamAssociation.description: Grants permission to approve a team association request for your AWS Account

BatchCreateTableRows.description: Grants permission to create new rows in a table

BatchDeleteTableRows.description: Grants permission to delete rows from a table

BatchUpdateTableRows.description: Grants permission to update rows in a table

BatchUpsertTableRows.description: Grants permission to upsert rows in a table

CreateTeam.description: Grants permission to create a new Amazon Honeycode team for your AWS Account

CreateTenant.description: Grants permission to create a new tenant within Amazon Honeycode for your AWS Account

DeleteDomains.description: Grants permission to delete Amazon Honeycode domains for your AWS Account

DeregisterGroups.description: Grants permission to remove groups from an Amazon Honeycode team for your AWS Account

DescribeTableDataImportJob.description: Grants permission to get details about a table data import job

DescribeTeam.description: Grants permission to get details about Amazon Honeycode teams for your AWS Account

GetScreenData.description: Grants permission to load the data from a screen

InvokeScreenAutomation.description: Grants permission to invoke a screen automation

ListDomains.description: Grants permission to list all Amazon Honeycode domains and their verification status for your AWS Account

ListGroups.description: Grants permission to list all groups in an Amazon Honeycode team for your AWS Account

ListTableColumns.description: Grants permission to list the columns in a table

ListTableRows.description: Grants permission to list the rows in a table

ListTables.description: Grants permission to list the tables in a workbook

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list all tags for a resource

ListTeamAssociations.description: Grants permission to list all pending and approved team associations with your AWS Account

ListTenants.description: Grants permission to list all tenants of Amazon Honeycode for your AWS Account

QueryTableRows.description: Grants permission to query the rows of a table using a filter

RegisterDomainForVerification.description: Grants permission to request verification of the Amazon Honeycode domains for your AWS Account

RegisterGroups.description: Grants permission to add groups to an Amazon Honeycode team for your AWS Account

RejectTeamAssociation.description: Grants permission to reject a team association request for your AWS Account

RestartDomainVerification.description: Grants permission to restart verification of the Amazon Honeycode domains for your AWS Account

StartTableDataImportJob.description: Grants permission to start a table data import job

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateTeam.description: Grants permission to update an Amazon Honeycode team for your AWS Account
